notes: Stealth-detection and electronic-warfare specialist Unique base — one instance on the map, sited on Plains, no terrain exception. Covert Works builds Ghost Tank (stealth armor) and Disruptor (EW troop, suppresses enemy defensive building targeting in its radius); Barracks (shared building type — see data/buildings/barracks.json for the full list of bases that build it) gives Signal Ridge its own infantry roster too. Radar Array extends this player's vision map-wide and is the first building whose effect isn't local to its own base; it's pre-seeded/fixed (isFixed: true on data/buildings/radar_array.json, same pattern as HQ/Ice Spire) so its map-wide vision bonus can't be stacked by building more than one. EMP Turret is the specialty defense — a Turret variant applying an EMP status on hit (immobilizes Land vehicles, destroys Air troops outright except empImmune ones). initialGarrison omits Disruptor (damage 0, empty canTarget — a pure EW/aura unit, not a combatant, same reasoning as excluding Engineer/Glider/Tank Carrier elsewhere).
